column1: # Conversion rules: upstream TypeScript pattern → Crystal replacement
# Format: from_language to_language upstream_kind crystal_kind notes
# These rules explain why certain port rows are intentional_divergence.
# They are consumed by generate_inventory_facts.rb to produce parity_facts.pl.

column7: Upstream vendor adapters (Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible, mock) replaced by Crig as sole LLM driver
Upstream message types replaced by Crig API message handling
Vendor-specific LLM config replaced by Crig configuration

column6: Vendor-specific LLM adapter replaced by injected Crig agent
Vendor-specific LLM adapter replaced by injected Crig agent
Vendor-specific LLM config replaced by Crig configuration

column7: Upstream mock adapter replaced by injectable fake agents/procs in specs
Tau Prolog replaced by crolog/SWI-Prolog for Prolog queries
Tau Prolog replaced by crolog/SWI-Prolog for Prolog queries
Tau Prolog replaced by crolog/SWI-Prolog for Prolog queries
Upstream BM25 index replaced by dsisnero/bm25 shard with Porter2 + stopwords
Upstream document entry type replaced by Bm25::Document

column6: Node.js dynamic module loading replaced by idempotent JSON manifest discovery + AdapterFactory
Node.js duck-typed runtime guard replaced by JSON descriptor validation
Tree-sitter initialization handled by tree_sitter shard at compile time

column7: Clojure WASM parser deferred; Crystal uses ClojureSourceExtractor as parser-independent path
